metadata.instruction: Find the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song on Chrome. Once you find the lyrics, save the webpage as a PDF so I can print it.
metadata.context: I want to print the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song.

actions.window_title: Computer Use Logger

l3.rationale: Moved the pointer within the logger window.

l4.rationale: Moved to the Google Chrome launcher item and opened the browser application.

l5.rationale: Application navigation and app search are used to open Chrome before searching.
